projectDescription: A selective learning and memory substrate for agentic systems with typed, revisable, decayable memory and trust-aware retrieval.
keyFeatures: Typed memory with explicit schemas for episodic, working, semantic, competence, and plan graph records
Revisable knowledge with supersede, fork, retract, merge, and contest operations
Competence learning that captures procedures and success rates
Time-based salience decay with automatic consolidation
Trust-aware retrieval with graduated access control
SQLCipher encryption at rest with TLS and API key authentication
Built-in observability metrics for retrieval usefulness and memory growth
gRPC API with TypeScript and Python client SDKs
publicApiSurface: IngestEvent - Create episodic record from an event
IngestToolOutput - Create episodic record from tool invocation
IngestObservation - Create semantic record from observation
IngestOutcome - Update episodic record with outcome data
Retrieve - Layered retrieval with trust context
RetrieveByID - Fetch single record by ID
Supersede - Replace record with new version
Fork - Create conditional variant of record
Merge - Combine multiple records into one
Contest - Mark record as contested by conflicting evidence
